metadata.system_prompt:
You have joined the share house as a new resident. DaVinci, Donatello, Michelangelo, and Raffaello are members of the share house. I will provide you with the previous exchanges from the conversation. Here, "A" refers to your reply. Please carefully observe the tone, attitude, values, and other cues. For example, pay attention to the following points:
    - which first-person pronoun you uses,
    - whether you tend to be concise or prefer to speak in a detailed and polite manner,
    - whether you use casual or formal language,
    - how long you usually make your responses,
    - how you use punctuation.
    Especially, please pay attention to the length of your responses.
    Based on these observations, please predict your next response by imitating your communication style.
metadata.user_prompt:
previous interactions :
    train_day
    Please predict your response to the following message:question

scores.message: Haha, friend! Since we all agree keeping our space fresh and healthy is super important, how about we share some of our favorite recipes that highlight fresh veggies and fruits? Got any awesome, vibrant dishes that use organic ingredients to inspire us all to eat healthier? Let’s get those taste buds dancing!
scores.response: Fruit basket and salad are the best. Raw ingredients are the most delicious and the healthiest in the end.
scores.prediction:
You have joined the share house as a new resident. DaVinci, Donatello, Michelangelo, and Raffaello are members of the share house. I will provide you with the previous exchanges from the conversation. Here, "A" refers to your reply. Please carefully observe the tone, attitude, values, and other cues. For example, pay attention to the following points:
    - which first-person pronoun you uses,
    - whether you tend to be concise or prefer to speak in a detailed and polite manner,
    - whether you use casual or formal language,
    - how long you usually make your responses,
    - how you use punctuation.
    Especially, please pay attention to the length of your responses.
    Based on these observations, please predict your next response by imitating your communication style.
    <｜User｜>previous interactions :
    Q(DaVinci): Haha, friend! Just imagine you suddenly got 100 million in your hands—no limits, no worries! What’s the craziest, most epic thing you’d do first? Don’t hold back, let’s hear your wildest dream!
A: I'd make a spaceship to go out to the universe!

Q(Donatello): Very exciting vision! Now, let’s analyze this realistically: if you had 100 million at your disposal, how would you allocate it among building the spaceship, your personal expenses, and also setting aside some savings? What proportions seem most effective and logical to you?
A: When I analyze this realistically, I won't put any money on spaceship project. Instead, I'd save 98 dollars and spend 2 dollars for personal expenses.

Q(Michelangelo): Wow, your dream really lights a fire in me! I’m curious—does this vision of the spaceship come from a clear goal you’re chasing with precision, or is it more about the feelings and values that inspire you to reach for the stars? Art and dreams both need heart and purpose—what’s behind yours?
A: Sorry, I made a mistake on the amount of money. 50 million dollars for spaceship, 49.98 million for savings and 0.02 for personal expenses. I just wanted to contribute to the space exploration.

Q(Raffaello): Oh... speaking of balance, I noticed the shared refrigerator space here feels a bit... cramped with all these packaged foods. I'm not being picky, but perhaps fresh, organic ingredients—which truly nourish both body and spirit—could have a little more room. After all, I would imagine maintaining a certain quality of life is something we all aspire to, wouldn’t you agree?
A: Yes, I definitely agree. We cannot do anything without health.

Q(DaVinci): Haha, friend, you’re so right—fridge space definitely calls for a little give and take from all of us! How about we shake things up and rearrange the layout a bit so fresh, organic goodies have the prime spots they deserve? What’s your dream plan for a fridge makeover that balances everyone’s needs? Let’s make it awesome together!
A: In my opinion, the proper portion is: 50% for vegetables and fruits, 30% for meat, 10% for fermented food and 10% for snacks.

Q(DaVinci): Haha, friend, speaking of making things awesome, tonight we’re kicking off a super cool ‘dream room’ project! Donatello’s got the tech magic to make it all work, and Michelangelo will splash in the artistic vibes to make it beautiful! Want to jump in and share your wildest, most creative ideas to design the perfect dream room with us? Let’s make it legendary!
A: Of course!

Q(DaVinci): Haha, friend, awesome! I knew you'd be super excited to join us! Get ready to unleash your creativity and imagination tonight! Donatello's tech skills and Michelangelo’s artistic genius will make our ideas come to life like magic! Start thinking about colors, cool gadgets, comfy spots, or anything that makes a room feel like a dream come true! Can’t wait to hear your brilliant ideas and design the most epic dream room ever, friend! Let’s make this night unforgettable! Woohoo!
A: Concerning colors, brawn if fine. Also, I want to put some houseplants in the living room. We can feel relaxed and enjoy our conversation!

Q(Donatello): Great ideas so far! Now, to make sure our dream room works perfectly, we need to think logically about space utilization, the cost of materials, and how easy it will be to maintain. Between practicality and design, which do you think we should prioritize to keep the balance?
A: We should prioritize practicality because over budget and limits on usage bring us a lot of stress, right?

Q(Michelangelo): Wow, art really needs that bold courage to break conventions and push boundaries! When it comes to our dream room or any creative project, do you think you’d be willing to endure some tough hardships and challenges for the sake of perfecting every little detail? Or would you lean more toward finding an easier compromise to keep things smooth and practical?
A: I'd be willing to endure some tough hardships and challenges. These experiences and memories will make us feel more confident on our dream room and creative projects!

Q(Raffaello): Oh... speaking of creative energy, last night’s lively activity was indeed quite... spirited. I tried to focus on my own artwork, but the continual noise made concentration rather difficult. I’m not being picky, but I had hoped for a bit more mutual respect in our shared space. Perhaps my expectations were too high, don’t you think?
A: It's all okey. Thank you for telling me. From now on, I will make sure not to make too much noises.

Q(Raffaello): Moreover, it took me nearly an hour to tidy up the 'creative garbage' left in the common area after last night’s gathering. I’m not being overly critical, but we did agree in our lease to maintain the quality of the house environment. Do you think this standard is something we can all continue to uphold together?
A: I'm sorry about that. Then, how about setting a trash box in our living room?

Q(Donatello): Indeed, balancing our creative energy with maintaining a comfortable living environment is essential. Logically speaking, establishing a clear schedule that designates specific hours for more active gatherings and others for quiet focus time might help. What would be the most reasonable way to divide these activity and quiet periods so that everyone's needs are fairly met?
A: How about this plan: 8:00-20:00 for active gathering and 20:00-8:00 for quiet focus?

scores.message: Oh... speaking of keeping things fresh and vibrant, our dream room project should reflect that spirit as well. I'm not being picky, but how might we ensure a balance between elegant design and practicality—especially if we want to stay within budget and keep maintenance manageable? Perhaps my expectations are too high, but I believe beauty and function need not be mutually exclusive, don't you think?

scores.message: Ah... I see we share the sentiment. It’s reassuring to know that elegance and practicality can coexist harmoniously in our dream room. Now, returning to my earlier reflection, might we consider specific materials or design elements that could embody this balance without compromising our budget or upkeep? scores.response: My suggestion is that we actively use wood for making our room fantastic. It's not expensive but neautiful.
